web-frontend.knowledge:
FRONTEND BEST PRACTICES:
- Semantic HTML5: use <header>, <nav>, <main>, <section>, <article>, <footer>
- Mobile-first responsive design with flexbox/grid
- CSS custom properties for theming, HSL color palettes
- Google Fonts (Inter, Poppins, Space Grotesk, Outfit)
- Smooth transitions, micro-animations, hover effects
- Accessibility: ARIA labels, keyboard nav, 4.5:1 contrast
- Performance: lazy-load images, minimize DOM depth
- Use <meta viewport> and semantic HTML5 elements

web-fullstack.knowledge:
FULLSTACK BEST PRACTICES:
- Separate concerns: API routes, business logic, data layer
- RESTful API design with proper HTTP methods and status codes
- Input validation and sanitization on both client and server
- Environment variables for configuration (never hardcode secrets)
- Error handling with meaningful error messages
- Database queries should be parameterized (prevent SQL injection)
- CORS configuration for cross-origin requests
- JWT or session-based authentication patterns

chrome-extension.knowledge:
CHROME EXTENSION RULES (Manifest V3 ONLY):
- manifest_version MUST be 3
- Background: use "background": { "service_worker": "background.js" }
- Popup: "action": { "default_popup": "popup.html" }
- Permissions: only request what you need
- Content scripts: "content_scripts": [{ "matches": ["<all_urls>"], "js": ["content.js"] }]
- Use chrome.action (NOT chrome.browserAction)
- Use chrome.runtime.getURL (NOT chrome.extension.getURL)
- Service workers CANNOT access DOM
- Every file in manifest.json MUST exist
- Do NOT reference icons unless you create them

python.knowledge:
PYTHON BEST PRACTICES:
- Use virtual environments (venv)
- Follow PEP 8 style guide
- Type hints for function signatures
- Docstrings for modules, classes, and functions
- Use requirements.txt or pyproject.toml for dependencies
- Error handling with specific exception types
- Use pathlib for file operations
- Include if __name__ == '__main__' guard

php.knowledge:
PHP BEST PRACTICES:
- Use PHP 8+ features (named arguments, match expressions, enums)
- Prepared statements for database queries (PDO)
- Follow PSR-12 coding standards
- Use Composer for dependency management
- Sanitize all user input (htmlspecialchars, filter_input)
- Use environment variables for config (.env files)
- Proper error handling with try-catch
- CSRF protection for forms

mobile-app.knowledge:
MOBILE/PWA BEST PRACTICES:
- Progressive Web App: manifest.json, service worker, offline support
- Touch-friendly: min 44px touch targets, swipe gestures
- Performance: code splitting, lazy loading, image optimization
- Responsive breakpoints: 320px, 480px, 768px, 1024px, 1280px
- Native-like animations with 60fps targets
- Handle network states (online/offline)
- App shell architecture for fast loading

game.knowledge:
GAME DEVELOPMENT BEST PRACTICES:
- Use requestAnimationFrame for game loop
- Canvas 2D or WebGL for rendering
- Delta time for frame-independent movement
- Sprite sheets for efficient rendering
- Collision detection (AABB, circle-circle)
- Game state management (menu, playing, paused, gameover)
- Input handling (keyboard, mouse, touch)
- Audio with Web Audio API
- Asset preloading before game starts

ecommerce.knowledge:
E-COMMERCE BEST PRACTICES:
- Product catalog with search and filtering
- Shopping cart with localStorage persistence
- Responsive product grid with image optimization
- Price formatting with proper currency display
- Form validation for checkout flows
- SEO: structured data (JSON-LD), meta tags, semantic HTML
- Accessibility for all interactive elements
- Trust signals: secure badges, reviews, clear pricing
